category_sources: source_facts.description says it processes data streams; official Apache Storm site describes distributed real-time computation for unbounded streams.
display_name_sources: Official website and repository use Apache Storm as the project name.
docs_sources: Official Storm website has versioned documentation for 2.8.8 and a documentation navigation section.
repo_sources: Official Apache Storm website links 'Fork me on GitHub' to apache/storm; official repository README points documentation back to storm.apache.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Apache Storm site list stream processing, real-time analytics, distributed RPC, ETL, and command-line client documentation.
